classifications.phrase: GDP is expected to decline materially in the September quarter
the unemployment rate will move higher over coming months
wage and price pressures remain subdued
Very accommodative financial conditions will continue to support the recovery
extend the bond purchases at $4 billion a week until at least February 2022
It will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the 2…
this condition will not be met before 2024

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish stance throughout, emphasizing economic weakness from Delta, subdued inflation pressures, and a commitment to maintaining accommodative conditions with no rate increases until 2024.
